message:
feat(runtime,server): track per-client peer address for CLIENT LIST

- Add peer_addr: Option<SocketAddr> to ClientSession
- Set from TcpListener::accept() in fr-server
- CLIENT LIST addr field now reports real peer address instead of
  hardcoded 127.0.0.1:0

Closes: frankenredis-23c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
